mapper.select: SELECT kc.id, kc.title, kc.summary, kc.content_type as contentType, kc.cover_image as coverImage, kc.category_name as categoryName, kc.view_count as viewCount, kc.collect_count as collectCount, kc.like_count as likeCount, cat.icon as categoryIcon, cat.color as categoryColor FROM knowledge_content kc LEFT JOIN knowledge_category cat ON kc.category_id = cat.id AND cat.deleted = 0 WHERE kc.deleted = 0 AND kc.status = 1 AND kc.audit_status = 1 ORDER BY kc.view_count DESC, kc.collect_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT kc.id, kc.title, kc.summary, kc.content_type as contentType, kc.cover_image as coverImage, kc.category_name as categoryName, kc.view_count as viewCount, kc.author_name as authorName, kc.publish_time as publishTime, CASE WHEN fc.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isCollected FROM knowledge_content kc LEFT JOIN favorites_collection fc ON kc.id = fc.resource_id AND fc.resource_type = 'KNOWLEDGE' AND fc.user_id = #{userId} AND fc.deleted = 0 WHERE kc.deleted = 0 AND kc.status = 1 AND kc.audit_status = 1 ORDER BY kc.publish_time DESC, kc.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT kc.id, kc.title, kc.summary, kc.content, kc.content_type as contentType, kc.cover_image as coverImage, kc.category_id as categoryId, kc.category_name as categoryName, kc.view_count as viewCount, kc.collect_count as collectCount, kc.like_count as likeCount, kc.share_count as shareCount, kc.author_name as authorName, kc.author_id as authorId, kc.is_top as isTop, kc.publish_time as publishTime, kc.keywords, kc.tags, cat.icon as categoryIcon, cat.color as categoryColor, CASE WHEN fc.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isCollected, CASE WHEN fl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isLiked FROM knowledge_content kc LEFT JOIN knowledge_category cat ON kc.category_id = cat.id AND cat.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN favorites_collection fc ON kc.id = fc.resource_id AND fc.resource_type = 'KNOWLEDGE' AND fc.user_id = #{userId} AND fc.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN favorites_like fl ON kc.id = fl.resource_id AND fl.resource_type = 'KNOWLEDGE' AND fl.user_id = #{userId} AND fl.deleted = 0 WHERE kc.id = #{id} AND kc.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_content SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE knowledge_category cat SET knowledge_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_content WHERE category_id = cat.id AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND audit_status = 1 ) WHERE cat.deleted = 0
